It can loose 100,000-volt bursts of electricity, instantly downing foes several times its size.

Its body is dry. When it gets cold at night, its hide is said to become coated with a fine dew.
Its body is dry. When it gets cold at night, its hide is said to become coated with a fine dew.

To protect itself from attackers, it curls up into a ball. It lives in arid regions with minimal rainfall.
To protect itself from attackers, it curls up into a ball. It lives in arid regions with minimal rainfall.

Both its fur and its tails are beautiful. As it grows, the tails split and form more tails.
Both its fur and its tails are beautiful. As it grows, the tails split and form more tails.

As each tail grows, its fur becomes more lustrous. When held, it feels slightly warm.

It looks like snow come to life, and the breath it exhales is −58 degrees Fahrenheit. Another name for it is Keokeo.
After long years in the ever-snowcapped mountains of Alola, this Vulpix has gained power over ice.
If you observe its curly hairs through a microscope, you'll see small ice particles springing up.
These Pokémon live in packs in the snowy mountains and defend themselves with icy breath. I suspect this species changed its form to adapt to the frigid climate.
They live together in a skulk, helping one another. Before eating their prey, they freeze it solid with their −58 degree Fahrenheit breath.
In hot weather, this Pokémon makes ice shards with its six tails and sprays them around to cool itself off.

Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

Dwells on sacred peaks perpetually covered in snow. Said to appear to virtuous people who have lost their way on mountain paths—it then guides them back down to the mountain's base.
Possessing a calm demeanor, this Pokémon was revered as a deity incarnate before it was identified as a regional variant of Ninetales.
It creates drops of ice in its coat and showers them over its enemies. Anyone who angers it will be frozen stiff in an instant.

When it wavers its big, round eyes, it begins singing a lullaby that makes everyone drowsy.
When it wavers its big, round eyes, it begins singing a lullaby that makes everyone drowsy.

It loves the blood of humans and Pokémon. It flies around at night in search of neck veins.

It may be mistaken for a clump of weeds. If you try to yank it out of the ground, it shrieks horribly.
If exposed to moonlight, it starts to move. It roams far and wide at night to scatter its seeds.
During the day, it stays in the cold underground to avoid the sun. It grows by bathing in moonlight.
It often plants its root feet in the ground during the day and sows seeds as it walks about at night.
It often plants its root feet in the ground during the day and sows seeds as it walks about at night.

Its body is always slimy. It often bangs its head on the river bottom as it swims but seems not to care.
It has a sluggish nature. It lies at the river's bottom, waiting for prey to stray into its mouth.
A dim-witted Pokémon. It doesn’t care if it bumps its head into boats or rocks while swimming.
This carefree Pokémon has an easygoing nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.
Due to its relaxed and carefree attitude, it often bumps its head on riverbed boulders and boat hulls as it swims.

abilities.name: Damp
abilities.desc: The Pokémon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokémon from using explosive moves such as Self-Destruct.

abilities.name: Water Absorb
abilities.desc: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: Unaware
abilities.desc: When attacking, the Pokémon ignores the target's stat changes.

zukanDescs.desc: By reading air currents, it can predict things such as the weather or its foe's next move.
It unleashes psychic power from the orb on its forehead. When its power is exhausted, the orb grows dull and dark.
Wields an arcane power with which it can predict the weather and even people's thoughts. When bathed in sunshine, the scarlet orb on its brow glows and builds energy.
Its fur has the look and feel of velvet. The orb on its forehead glows when it uses psychic power.
Its fur has the look and feel of velvet. The orb on its forehead glows when it uses psychic power.
The tip of its forked tail quivers when it is predicting its opponent's next move.
It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its enemy's actions.
It uses the fine fur on its body to sense movement in the air and predict the weather...as well as its foes' thoughts.

abilities.name: Synchronize
abilities.desc: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon will be inflicted with the same status condition.

abilities.name: Magic Bounce
abilities.desc: The Pokémon reflects status moves instead of getting hit by them.

zukanDescs.desc: When this Pokémon becomes angry, its pores secrete a poisonous sweat, which it sprays at its opponent's eyes.
On the night of a full moon, or when it gets excited, the ring patterns on its body glow yellow.
It is most active in the wee hours of the night, when moonlight bathes the land. Its large eyes can pierce the darkness and perceive prey with absolute clarity.
The light of the moon changed Eevee's genetic structure. It lurks in the darkness, waiting for prey.
The light of the moon changed Eevee's genetic structure. It lurks in the darkness, waiting for prey.
When exposed to the moon's aura, the rings on its body glow faintly and it gains a mysterious power.
When darkness falls, the rings on the body begin to glow, striking fear in the hearts of anyone nearby.
The light of the moon changed Eevee's genetic structure. It lurks in the darkness, waiting for prey.

abilities.name: Synchronize
abilities.desc: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon will be inflicted with the same status condition.

abilities.name: Inner Focus
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

zukanDescs.desc: Widely shunned as a bearer of ill fortune. Upon crossing paths with this creature, I've been told one must chant "Workrum, Workrum—bad luck, don't come" as a protective incantation.
It is believed that seeing this Pokémon at night will bring about ominous occurrences.
It appears near travelers to lure them into deep forests. It is said to bring misfortune.
Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.
If spotted, it will lure an unwary person into chasing it, then lose the pursuer on mountain trails.

abilities.name: Insomnia
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's insomnia prevents it from falling asleep.

abilities.name: Super Luck
abilities.desc: The Pokémon is so lucky that the critical-hit ratios of its moves are boosted.

abilities.name: Prankster
abilities.desc: Gives priority to the Pokémon's status moves.

zukanDescs.desc: Miraculously, this former Slowpoke's latent intelligence was drawn out when Shellder poison raced through its brain.
Slowking can solve any problem presented to it, but no one can understand a thing Slowking says.
Being bitten by Shellder gave it intelligence comparable to that of internationally recognized scientists.
Being bitten by Shellder gave it intelligence comparable to that of internationally recognized scientists.
When its head was bitten, toxins entered Slowpoke's head and unlocked an extraordinary power.
It has incredible intellect and intuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.
It has incredible intellect and intuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.

abilities.name: Oblivious
abilities.desc: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Own Tempo
abilities.desc: The Pokémon sticks to its own tempo, preventing it from becoming confused or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Regenerator
abilities.desc: The Pokémon has a little of its HP restored when withdrawn from battle.

zukanDescs.desc: A combination of toxins and the shock of evolving has increased Shellder's intelligence to the point that Shellder now controls Slowking.
While chanting strange spells, this Pokémon combines its internal toxins with what it's eaten, creating strange potions.
It administers its potions to weakened Pokémon it sees. These potions are derived from poison and secreted from holes in Slowking's horns.
It creates potions by mixing toxins with the food it's eaten. Not even Slowking itself knows what effects the potions will have.
A combination of toxins and the shock of evolving has increased Shellder's intelligence to the point that Shellder now controls Slowking.

abilities.name: Curious Medicine
abilities.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

abilities.name: Own Tempo
abilities.desc: The Pokémon sticks to its own tempo, preventing it from becoming confused or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Regenerator
abilities.desc: The Pokémon has a little of its HP restored when withdrawn from battle.

zukanDescs.desc: It conceals itself in darkness, sending chills up travelers' spines with its childlike weeping. As it observes the frightened travelers with glee, the red orbs upon its chest let off an eerie light.
It loves to sneak up on people late at night and startle them with its shrieking cry.
It gets nourishment from fear that it absorbs into its red orbs. During the daytime, it sleeps in the shadows.
This Pokémon startles people in the middle of the night. It gathers fear as its energy.
It loves to bite and yank people's hair from behind without warning, just to see their shocked reactions.

abilities.name: Levitate
abilities.desc: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

zukanDescs.desc: It is hard to believe these strangely shaped Pokémon are truly living creatures. I've pointed out that the species' many forms resemble writing from other lands; no one will take me seriously.
Because the Pokémon is shaped like ancient writing, it is a huge mystery whether written language or Unown came first.
They seem to communicate among each other telepathically. They are always found stuck on walls.

abilities.desc: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

abilities.name: Levitate
abilities.desc: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

zukanDescs.desc: It hates light and shock. If attacked, it inflates its body to pump up its counterstrike.
To keep its pitch-black tail hidden, it lives quietly in the darkness. It is never first to attack.
It desperately tries to keep its black tail hidden. This behavior is said to be proof that its tail hides a secret.
It desperately tries to keep its black tail hidden. This behavior is said to be proof that its tail hides a secret.

abilities.name: Shadow Tag
abilities.desc: The Pokémon steps on the opposing Pokémon's shadows to prevent them from fleeing or switching out.

abilities.name: Telepathy
abilities.desc: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies.

zukanDescs.desc: Its tail has a separate small brain. The tail bites to repel any foe trying to sneak up on the Pokémon from behind.
While it sleeps, the head on its tail keeps watch. The tail doesn't need to sleep.
Though very small, the brain in its tail is still considered an important organ because it emits powerful psychic energy.
Girafarig's tail has a small head. It instinctively bites at any foe that approaches the Pokémon from behind.

abilities.name: Inner Focus
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Early Bird
abilities.desc: The Pokémon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other Pokémon.

abilities.name: Sap Sipper
abilities.desc: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Grass-type moves. Instead, its Attack stat is boosted.

zukanDescs.desc: It looks just like a pinecone. Its shell protects it from bird Pokémon that peck it by mistake.
It looks just like a pinecone. Its shell protects it from bird Pokémon that peck it by mistake.
It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.
It spits out a fluid that it uses to glue tree bark to its body. The fluid hardens when it touches air.

abilities.name: Sturdy
abilities.desc: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

abilities.name: Overcoat
abilities.desc: The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms. It is also protected from the effects of powders and spores.

zukanDescs.desc: It is encased in a steel shell. Forretress's eyes peer out, but what lies within this Pokémon's shell is unknown.
It is encased in a steel shell. Forretress's eyes peer out, but what lies within this Pokémon's shell is unknown.
It's usually found hanging on to a fat tree trunk. It shoots out bits of its shell when it sees action.
Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside this shell is a total mystery.

abilities.name: Sturdy
abilities.desc: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

abilities.name: Overcoat
abilities.desc: The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms. It is also protected from the effects of powders and spores.

zukanDescs.desc: This Pokémon's tiny wings have some scientists saying that Dunsparce used to fly through the sky in ancient times.
The nests Dunsparce live in are mazes of tunnels. They never get lost in their own nests—they can tell where they are by the scent of the dirt.
It digs into the ground with its tail and makes a mazelike nest. It can fly just a little.
It digs into the ground with its tail and makes a mazelike nest. It can fly just a little.
It creates mazes in dark locations. When spotted, it flees into the ground by digging with its tail.
If spotted, it escapes by burrowing with its tail. It can float just slightly using its wings.

abilities.name: Serene Grace
abilities.desc: Raises the likelihood of additional effects occurring when the Pokémon uses its moves.

abilities.name: Run Away
abilities.desc: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

abilities.name: Rattled
abilities.desc: The Pokémon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.

zukanDescs.desc: Its tail is tipped by a thick, horrible stinger. To bring down prey, it will first obscure their vision by covering their faces with its body, and then it will use the stinger to inject them with venom.
It sails on the winds with its limbs extended to strike from the sky. It aims for the prey’s face.
It sails on the winds with its limbs extended to strike from the sky. It aims for the prey’s face.
It builds its nest on a steep cliff. When it is done gliding, it hops along the ground back to its nest.
It glides as if sliding. It startles foes by clamping on to their faces, then jabs with its poison stinger.

abilities.name: Hyper Cutter
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's prized, mighty pincers prevent other Pokémon from lowering its Attack stat.

abilities.name: Sand Veil
abilities.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness in a sandstorm.

abilities.name: Immunity
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's immune system prevents it from being poisoned.

zukanDescs.desc: It is said that if an Onix lives for over 100 years, its composition changes to become diamond-like.
It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.
This Pokémon evolved through use of a strange item. Its body is coated with steel powder and notably hard—not even diamond can leave so much as a scratch.
Tempered underground under high pressure and heat, its body is harder than any metal.
It chews its way through boulders with its sturdy jaws. Its eyes can see in the darkness underground.
It chews its way through boulders with its sturdy jaws. Its eyes can see in the darkness underground.

abilities.name: Rock Head
abilities.desc: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.

abilities.name: Sturdy
abilities.desc: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

abilities.name: Sheer Force
abilities.desc: Removes any additional effects from the Pokémon's moves, but increases the moves' power.

zukanDescs.desc: To protect itself from opponents' attacks, it uses magnetism to control pieces of its hard outer shell that have flaked off.

abilities.name: Sand Force
abilities.desc: Boosts the power of Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves in a sandstorm.

zukanDescs.desc: Small Pokémon flee from its scary face. It is, however, considered by many people to be cute.
Small Pokémon flee from its scary face. It is, however, considered by many people to be cute.
In truth, it is a cowardly Pokémon. It growls eagerly in order to hide its fear from its opponent.
Its growls make its opponents uneasy. This laid-back Pokémon tends to sleep half the day.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

abilities.name: Run Away
abilities.desc: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

abilities.name: Rattled
abilities.desc: The Pokémon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.

zukanDescs.desc: It is timid in spite of its looks. If it becomes enraged, however, it will strike with its huge fangs.
It is timid in spite of its looks. If it becomes enraged, however, it will strike with its huge fangs.
It is actually timid and easily spooked. If attacked, it desperately flails its limbs about in an attempt to repel its opponent.
It can make most any Pokémon run away by opening its big mouth to reveal its thick fangs.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

abilities.name: Quick Feet
abilities.desc: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon has a status condition.

abilities.name: Rattled
abilities.desc: The Pokémon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.

zukanDescs.desc: When faced with a larger opponent, it swallows as much water as it can to match the opponent's size.
The small spikes covering its body developed from scales. They inject a toxin that causes fainting.
It shoots the poison spikes on its body in all directions. Its round form makes it a poor swimmer.
It shoots the poison spikes on its body in all directions. Its round form makes it a poor swimmer.
Be cautious if this Pokémon starts sucking in water—it will soon attack by scattering the toxic spikes that grow all over its body.
Experienced fishers say they try to catch Qwilfish in the brief moment that these Pokémon become defenseless just after launching poisonous spikes.
To fire off the poison spikes covering its body, it inflates itself by sucking in over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

abilities.name: Poison Point
abilities.desc: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

zukanDescs.desc: Fishers detest this troublesome Pokémon because it sprays poison from its spines, getting it everywhere. A different form of Qwilfish lives in other regions.
It lives just offshore in cold parts of the world. Its poisonous spikes are thicker and shorter than those of other regions' Qwilfish.
It absorbs toxins from the food it eats. The distinct purple spikes on its body are evidence of its potent poison.
This Pokémon eats toxic minerals to build up poison within itself. Get jabbed by it, and you'll face three days and three nights of misery.

abilities.name: Poison Point
abilities.desc: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

zukanDescs.desc: Bulky pincers account for one third of Scizor's body weight. A single swing of one of these pincers will crush a boulder completely.
Though its body is slim, Scizor has tremendous attacking power. Even Scizor's muscles are made of metal.
Evolved by way of a curious item. The shell covering its body has been shown to be stronger than forged steel.
It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.
It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.
This Pokémon's pincers, which contain steel, can crush any hard object they get ahold of into bits.
It swings its eye-patterned pincers up to scare its foes. This makes it look like it has three heads.
It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.desc: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Technician
abilities.desc: Powers up weak moves so the Pokémon can deal more damage with them.

abilities.name: Light Metal
abilities.desc: Halves the Pokémon's weight.

zukanDescs.desc: Due to the effects of Mega Evolution, its pincers have taken on a more diabolical form, ripping anything they pinch to shreds.

abilities.name: Technician
abilities.desc: Powers up weak moves so the Pokémon can deal more damage with them.

zukanDescs.desc: It stores berries inside its shell. To avoid attacks, it hides beneath rocks and remains completely still.
The berries stored in its vaselike shell eventually become a thick, pulpy juice.
It stores berries in its shell. The berries mix with its body fluids to become delicious juices.
It stores berries in its shell. The berries mix with its body fluids to become delicious juices.

abilities.name: Sturdy
abilities.desc: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

abilities.name: Gluttony
abilities.desc: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP is low, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to half or less.

abilities.name: Contrary
abilities.desc: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that attempts to boost its stats instead lower them— and attempts to lower its stats will boost them.

zukanDescs.desc: Heracross loves sweet sap and will go looking through forests for it. The Pokémon uses its two antennae to pick up scents as it searches.
This Pokémon takes pride in its strength, which allows it to lift things 100 times heavier than itself with no trouble at all.
This Pokémon has an unparalleled horn. Heracross itself demonstrates tremendous power—it's capable of throwing several people trained in the traditional arts of war at once.
It gathers in forests to search for tree sap, its favorite food. It’s strong enough to hurl foes.
Its powerful legs and claws give it enough power to hurl foes over great distances.
It loves sweet nectar. To keep all the nectar to itself, it hurls rivals away with its prized horn.
With its herculean powers, it can easily throw around an object that is 100 times its own weight.
This powerful Pokémon thrusts its prized horn under its enemies' bellies, then lifts and throws them.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.desc: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.

abilities.name: Guts
abilities.desc: It's so gutsy that having a status condition boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat.

abilities.name: Moxie
abilities.desc: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it shows moxie, which boosts its Attack stat.

zukanDescs.desc: It can grip things with its two horns and lift 500 times its own body weight.

abilities.name: Skill Link
abilities.desc: Maximizes the number of times multistrike moves hit.

zukanDescs.desc: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it suddenly extends the claws and startles its enemy.
It has a cunning yet savage disposition. It waits for parents to leave their nests, and then it sneaks in to steal their eggs.
This Pokémon shares roots with the Sneasel of Hisui, but unlike that species, this one is spiteful in personality. I hypothesize that water and earth can affect Sneasel's mind and body.
It feeds on eggs stolen from nests. Its sharply hooked claws rip vulnerable spots on prey.
It is extremely vicious and will not stop attacking until its foe is incapable of moving.
This cunning Pokémon hides under the cover of darkness, waiting to attack its prey.
This is a smart and sneaky Pokémon. A pair may work together to steal eggs by having one lure the parents away.

abilities.name: Inner Focus
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Keen Eye
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's keen eyes prevent its accuracy from being lowered.

abilities.name: Pickpocket
abilities.desc: The Pokémon steals the held item from attackers that make direct contact with it.

zukanDescs.desc: Its sturdy, curved claws are ideal for traversing precipitous cliffs. From the tips of these claws drips a venom that infiltrates the nerves of any prey caught in Sneasel's grasp.

zukanDescs.desc: It licks its paws because of the sweet honey that has soaked into them. It is cunning, stealing into the nests of Combee and taking for itself the honey that the Combee have amassed.
It lets honey soak into its paws so it can lick them all the time. Every set of paws tastes unique.
It lets honey soak into its paws so it can lick them all the time. Every set of paws tastes unique.
This Pokémon discreetly follows Combee to find their hive. It scoops up big dollops of honey in its palms to eat.
Its paws are soaked in oodles of honey. When nervous, Teddiursa will lick its paws and soon have a smile back on its face.

abilities.name: Pickup

abilities.name: Quick Feet

abilities.name: Honey Gather

zukanDescs.desc: When the cold season arrives in Hisui, this Pokémon will wander fields and mountains alike in search of its favorite berries. Ursaring's hunger during this time makes it a ferocious danger.
In its territory, it leaves scratches on trees that bear delicious berries or fruits.
In its territory, it leaves scratches on trees that bear delicious berries or fruits.
It usually wears a hardened expression, but when it's licking up honey—which it loves—the joy it feels will cause it to break into a wide grin.
It is quite skilled at climbing trees. If it comes across a Primeape while searching for berries in the treetops, trouble will surely ensue.

Its body is made of magma. If it doesn't keep moving, its body will cool and harden.
Its lava body can cool and chip away at times, but a magma bath will heal it right up.
It's said that in ancient times, when volcanoes were more active, there were many more Slugma than there are now.

abilities.name: Magma Armor
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's hot magma coating prevents it from being frozen.

abilities.name: Flame Body

zukanDescs.desc: Its body temperature is roughly 18,000 degrees Fahrenheit. Flames burst from gaps in its shell made of hardened magma.
Its body temperature is roughly 18,000 degrees Fahrenheit. Flames burst from gaps in its shell made of hardened magma.
This Pokémon lives near the craters of volcanoes. It stores fire energy in its shell of cooled and hardened magma.
According to folklore, a sudden increase in the wild Magcargo population heralds a volcanic eruption.

If it smells something enticing, it dashes off headlong to find the source of the aroma.
Swinub excels at sniffing out mushrooms buried beneath grass or snow. Since ancient times, the people of Hisui have often relied upon this skill.
It loves eating mushrooms that grow under dead grass. It also finds hot springs while foraging.
It loves eating mushrooms that grow under dead grass. It also finds hot springs while foraging.
It searches for food by digging into the ground with its snout. Even frozen ground doesn't give it any trouble.
It rubs its snout against the ground, digging through the soil as it searches for food. Sometimes it digs up hot springs.

zukanDescs.desc: If it charges at an enemy, the hairs on its back stand up straight. It is very sensitive to sound.
Although its legs are short, its rugged hooves prevent it from slipping, even on icy ground.
The long fur of this Pokémon covers its eyes, ears, and even limbs, allowing Piloswine to resist harshly frigid conditions. The Pokémon's white tusks can be used to defeat its enemies.
Its shaggy coat makes it unable to see. It checks surroundings with its sensitive nose instead.
Its shaggy coat makes it unable to see. It checks surroundings with its sensitive nose instead.
Covered by a shaggy coat, it is resistant to the cold. Its tusks of ice thicken when it snows.
Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.

These Pokémon live in warm seas. In prehistoric times, many lived in the oceans around the Galar region as well.
Many live in the clean seas of the south. They apparently can’t live in polluted waters.

Sudden climate change wiped out this ancient kind of Corsola. This Pokémon absorbs others' life-force through its branches.

abilities.name: Weak Armor

Spits water from its mouth with incredible accuracy. It captures Burmy by shooting them down off the branches from which they dangle.
It squirts water forcefully from its mouth to shoot down flying prey.

zukanDescs.desc: It has a tendency to want to be in holes. It prefers rock crags or pots and sprays ink from them before attacking.
It traps enemies with its suction-cupped tentacles, then smashes them with its rock-hard head.
While Octillery still shoots water from its mouth, the drastic anatomical difference between it and Remoraid meant that for a long time, no one believed the former evolved from the latter.
It lives in the gaps of boulders and in holes on the seafloor. Its suction cups grip prey tightly.
It obscures its foe’s vision by spitting a cloud of black ink. It makes its nest among boulders.

zukanDescs.desc: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.
It has a generous habit of sharing its food with people and Pokémon, so it's always scrounging around for more food.
It carries food rolled up in its tail. It has a habit of sharing food with people lost in the mountains.

It swims elegantly, mindless of Remoraid hitching onto its broad fins. It is naturally docile.

Skarmory is clad entirely in ironhard armor. It flies at speeds over 180 mph.
Skarmory is clad entirely in ironhard armor. It flies at speeds over 180 mph.

Since the feathers that it sheds are thin and sharp, people apparently once used them as swords.
Because it nests in bramble bushes, the feathers of its chicks grow hard from being scratched by thorns.

If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.
Upon hearing its eerie howls, other Pokémon get the shivers and head straight back to their nests.
The flames it breathes when angry contain toxins. If they cause a burn, it will hurt forever.

zukanDescs.desc: With the arrival of a storm at sea, this Pokémon will show itself on the surface. When a Kingdra and a Dragonite meet, a fierce battle ensues.
Scales shed by this Pokémon have such a splendorous gleam to them that they've been given to royalty as gifts.
It lives in caves on the seafloor and creates giant whirlpools every time it moves.
It lives in caves on the seafloor and creates giant whirlpools every time it moves.

It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.

It is far stronger than it appears. If a Phanpy is swinging its trunk around and your arm gets hit by it, your arm bone will shatter.

After artificial intelligence was implemented in Porygon2, the Pokémon began using a strange language that only other Porygon2 understand.
A bizarre item caused this Pokémon to evolve. While it now exhibits many new gestures and expressions, its biology remains inscrutable.
With planetary development software installed, it became capable of working in space.
With planetary development software installed, it became capable of working in space.

zukanDescs.desc: Its strangely shaped antlers have the power to bewitch those who see them. Medicine made by grinding up the black orbs from fallen antlers is an effective treatment for insomnia.

Staring at its antlers creates an odd sensation as if one were being drawn into their centers.

If it rampages, it knocks down mountains and buries rivers. Maps must be redrawn afterward.

If it rampages, it knocks down mountains and buries rivers. Maps must be redrawn afterward.

It lives in tropical jungles. The bunch of fruit around its neck is delicious. The fruit grows twice a year.
Delicious fruits grew out from around its neck because it always ate the same kind of fruit.

abilities.name: Chlorophyll
abilities.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

abilities.name: Solar Power
abilities.desc: In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat is boosted, but its HP decreases every turn.

abilities.name: Harvest
abilities.desc: May create another Berry after one is used.

zukanDescs.desc: Can emit waves of air powerful enough to knock out prey taller than itself. I hypothesize that it amplifies the faint sound of wind within its body.
To knock foes flying, it makes the air shudder with its cries. It converses using seven cries.
Chimecho emits ultrasonic cries. It floats on the wind to travel great distances.
It uses the sucker on its head to hang from a tree or from eaves. It can produce seven different tones.
Its cries echo inside its hollow body to emerge as beautiful notes for startling and repelling foes.
Chimecho create air vibrations with their cries to send foes flying. They have seven different types of cries they use to converse with one another.

abilities.name: Levitate
abilities.desc: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

zukanDescs.desc: It vibrates its entire body to attack in all directions using sound waves. Any who hear the vibrations get so confused, they forget who they are.
Swift as the wind, Absol races through fields and mountains. Its curved, bow-like horn is acutely sensitive to the warning signs of natural disasters.
Because of this Pokémon's ability to detect danger, people mistook Absol as a bringer of doom.
It senses coming disasters and appears before people only to warn them of impending danger.
It senses coming disasters and appears before people only to warn them of impending danger.
It senses coming disasters and appears before people only to warn them of impending danger.

abilities.name: Pressure
abilities.desc: Puts other Pokémon under pressure, causing them to expend more PP to use their moves.

abilities.name: Super Luck
abilities.desc: The Pokémon is so lucky that the critical-hit ratios of its moves are boosted.

abilities.name: Justified
abilities.desc: When the Pokémon is hit by a Dark-type attack, its Attack stat is boosted by its sense of justice.

zukanDescs.desc: When this Pokémon whips the winglike fur on its back as though beating its wings, it sends an intimidating aura flying at its opponents.

abilities.name: Magic Bounce
abilities.desc: The Pokémon reflects status moves instead of getting hit by them.

zukanDescs.desc: Using fur that it has made into sharp, clawlike shapes, it cuts down foes with a single blow. This is an act of kindness to keep them from suffering.
It tends to move in a pack. Individuals squash against one another to toughen their spirits.
It tends to move in a pack with others. They cluster in a tight group to sleep in a cave.
They grow strong by pushing up against one another en masse. They love eating sweet fruit.
They grow strong by pushing up against one another en masse. They love eating sweet fruit.

abilities.name: Shadow Tag
abilities.desc: The Pokémon steps on the opposing Pokémon's shadows to prevent them from fleeing or switching out.

abilities.name: Telepathy
abilities.desc: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies.

zukanDescs.desc: It's said that if they are seen at midnight, they'll cause heavy snow. They eat snow and ice to survive.
It can only survive in cold areas. It bounces happily around, even in environments as cold as −150 degrees Fahrenheit.
Arrives alongside the first snow. It's thought that homes Snorunt visit will prosper for many generations. By tradition, one might offer a lump of ice made from pure water at one's front door.
In some snowy lands, certain folklore says a house will prosper if a Snorunt lives there.
In some snowy lands, certain folklore says a house will prosper if a Snorunt lives there.
It is said that several Snorunt gather under giant leaves and live together in harmony.
It is said that a home visited by a Snorunt will prosper. It can withstand cold of −150 degrees Fahrenheit.
In some snowy lands, certain folklore says a house will prosper if a Snorunt lives there.

abilities.name: Inner Focus
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: Ice Body
abilities.desc: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in snow.

abilities.name: Moody
abilities.desc: Every turn, one of the Pokémon's stats will be boosted sharply but another stat will be lowered.

zukanDescs.desc: It has a body of ice that won't melt, even with fire. It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere.
It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere. It uses this power to freeze its foes.
It covers its body with an armor of ice harder than steel. Uses its breath to freeze prey, which it then devours as if they were frozen desserts.
To protect itself, it clad its body in an armor of ice, made by freezing moisture in the air.
To protect itself, it clad its body in an armor of ice, made by freezing moisture in the air.
Its prey is instantaneously frozen stiff by the cold air it exhales from its huge mouth. While they're in that frozen state, it gobbles them up.
It prevents prey from escaping by instantaneously freezing moisture in the air.
To protect itself, it clad its body in an armor of ice, made by freezing moisture in the air.

zukanDescs.desc: When it spews stupendously cold air from its broken mouth, the entire area around it gets whited out.

abilities.name: Refrigerate
abilities.desc: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

zukanDescs.desc: This Pokémon's body is covered in blubber and impressively round. It's faster for Spheal to roll around than walk.
As it drifts among the waves, Spheal probes the sea. As soon as it spots prey, it informs the Walrein in its herd.
During the season when drift ice approaches the shore, Spheal prefers living on the ice—where fewer predators lurk—rather than the land. Its fur retains heat superbly and resists harsh cold.
It rolls across ice floes to reach shore because its body is poorly shaped for swimming.
It rolls across ice floes to reach shore because its body is poorly shaped for swimming.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.desc: The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage taken from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

abilities.name: Ice Body
abilities.desc: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in snow.

abilities.name: Oblivious
abilities.desc: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.

zukanDescs.desc: Sealeo live on top of drift ice. They go swimming when they're on the hunt, seeking out their prey by scent.
This Pokémon has a habit of spinning round things on its nose, whether those things are Poké Balls or Spheal.
Its white whiskers are very sensitive. Sealeo will balance Spheal on the tip of its nose, checking its scent and its feel to be sure the Spheal is healthy.
It habitually spins things on its nose. By doing so, it learns textures and odors.
It habitually spins things on its nose. By doing so, it learns textures and odors.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.desc: The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage taken from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

abilities.name: Oblivious

zukanDescs.desc: Walrein form herds of 20 to 30 individuals. When a threat appears, the herd's leader will protect the group with its life.
Walrein's tusks keep growing throughout its life. Tusks broken in battle will grow back to their usual impressive size in a year.
Its thick tusks are strong enough to shatter drift ice. They have been known to break, but they will grow back by the next year. The Hisui region is well known for these broken tusks.
It shatters ice with its big tusks. Its thick blubber repels not only the cold but also enemy attacks.
It shatters ice with its big tusks. Its thick blubber repels not only the cold but also enemy attacks.

zukanDescs.desc: It makes a single pearl during its lifetime. The pearl is said to amplify psychic power.
It makes a single pearl during its lifetime. The pearl is said to amplify psychic power.

abilities.desc: A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

abilities.name: Rattled
abilities.desc: The Pokémon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.

zukanDescs.desc: It lives deep in the sea. With a tail shaped like a small fish, it attracts unsuspecting prey.
It lives deep in the sea. With a tail shaped like a small fish, it attracts unsuspecting prey.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: Water Veil
abilities.desc: The Pokémon's water veil prevents it from being burned.

zukanDescs.desc: It lives at the bottom of the sea. In the springtime, its pink body turns more vivid for some reason.
It lives at the bottom of the sea. In the springtime, its pink body turns more vivid for some reason.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: Hydration
abilities.desc: Cures the Pokémon's status conditions in rain.

zukanDescs.desc: Rock-hard scales and oil-filled swim bladders allow this Pokémon to survive the intense water pressure of the deep sea.
This Pokémon was discovered during deep-sea exploration. Its appearance hasn't changed in 100,000,000 years, so it's called a living fossil.
This rare Pokémon was discovered during a deep-sea exploration. It has not changed in over 100 million years.
This rare Pokémon was discovered during a deep-sea exploration. It has not changed in over 100 million years.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.desc: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.

zukanDescs.desc: It lives in warm seas. It is said that couples who find this Pokémon will be blessed with eternal love.
It lives in warm seas. It is said that couples who find this Pokémon will be blessed with eternal love.
Its heart-shaped body makes it popular. In some places, you would give a Luvdisc to someone you love.
During the spawning season, countless Luvdisc congregate at coral reefs, turning the waters pink.

abilities.name: Swift Swim
abilities.desc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

abilities.name: Hydration
abilities.desc: Cures the Pokémon's status conditions in rain.

zukanDescs.desc: Bagon jumps off cliffs every day, trying to grow stronger so that someday it will be able to fly.
Bagon is a solitary Pokémon that doesn't form groups with others of its kind. It also has a head hard enough to cleave a boulder in one strike.
Dreaming of one day flying, it practices by leaping off cliffs every day.
Dreaming of one day flying, it practices by leaping off cliffs every day.
Its steel-hard head can shatter boulders. It longingly hopes for wings to grow so it can fly.
Its belief that it will be able to fly one day is apparently the influence of information carried in its genes.
Its well-developed neck muscles and ironlike head can smash boulders into pieces.

abilities.name: Rock Head
abilities.desc: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.

abilities.desc: Removes any additional effects from the Pokémon's moves, but increases the moves' power.

zukanDescs.desc: This Pokémon has covered its body in a hard shell that has the same composition as bone. Shelgon stores energy for evolution.
Shelgon ignores its hunger entirely, never eating any food. Apparently, Shelgon will evolve once all its energy stores are used up.
Within its rugged shell, its cells have begun changing. The shell peels off the instant the Pokémon evolves.
Within its rugged shell, its cells have begun changing. The shell peels off the instant the Pokémon evolves.
The cells within its shell transform with explosive speed, preparing it for evolution.
Its armored body makes all attacks bounce off. The armor is too tough, however, making it heavy and somewhat sluggish.
Within its rugged shell, its cells have begun changing. The shell peels off the instant the Pokémon evolves.

abilities.name: Rock Head
abilities.desc: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.

abilities.name: Overcoat
abilities.desc: The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms. It is also protected from the effects of powders and spores.

zukanDescs.desc: Salamence is an unusual Pokémon in that it was able to evolve a body with wings just by constantly wishing to be able to fly.
While basking in the joy of flight generally keeps this Pokémon in high spirits, Salamence turns into an uncontrollable menace if something angers it.
As a result of its long-held dream of flying, its cellular structure changed, and wings grew out.
As a result of its long-held dream of flying, its cellular structure changed, and wings grew out.
It flies around on its wings, which have grown in at last. In its happiness, it gushes hot flames, burning up everything it passes over.
It becomes uncontrollable if it is enraged. It destroys everything with shredding claws and fire.
It's uncontrollable if enraged. It flies around spouting flames, scorching fields and mountains.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

abilities.name: Moxie
abilities.desc: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it shows moxie, which boosts its Attack stat.

zukanDescs.desc: To streamline itself for flight, it pulls its forelegs into its shell. Salamence flies at high speeds even when faced with complex topographical features.

abilities.name: Aerilate
abilities.desc: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

zukanDescs.desc: From its rear, Beldum emits a magnetic force that rapidly pulls opponents in. They get skewered on Beldum's sharp claws.
The cells in this Pokémon's body are composed of magnetic material. Instead of blood, magnetic forces flow through Beldum's body.
They converse with one another by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.
They converse with one another by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.
The magnetic force generated by its body repels the ground's natural magnetism, letting it float.
All its cells are magnets. It communicates with others of its kind by transmitting magnetic forces from its body.
They communicate with one another by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.

abilities.name: Clear Body
abilities.desc: Prevents other Pokémon's moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokémon's stats.

abilities.name: Light Metal
abilities.desc: Halves the Pokémon's weight.

zukanDescs.desc: Two Beldum have become stuck together via their own magnetic forces. With two brains, the resulting Metang has doubled psychic powers.
Using magnetic forces to stay aloft, this Pokémon flies at high speeds, weaving through harsh mountain terrain in pursuit of prey.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its steel body won't be scratched if it collides with a jet.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its steel body won't be scratched if it collides with a jet.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its two brains are linked, amplifying its psychic power.
It adores magnetic minerals, so it pursues Nosepass at speeds exceeding 60 mph.
It is formed by two Beldum joining together. Its steel body won't be scratched if it collides with a jet.

abilities.name: Clear Body
abilities.desc: Prevents other Pokémon's moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokémon's stats.

abilities.name: Light Metal

zukanDescs.desc: Because the magnetic powers of these Pokémon get stronger in freezing temperatures, Metagross living on snowy mountains are full of energy.
Metagross is the result of the fusion of two Metang. This Pokémon defeats its opponents through use of its supercomputer-level brain.
Metang combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.
Metang combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.
It folds its four legs when flying. Its four brains are said to be superior to a supercomputer.
It firmly pins its prey using its four claws and large body. Then Metagross uses the mouth on its stomach to chew its prey to bits.
Metang combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.

abilities.name: Light Metal
abilities.desc: Halves the Pokémon's weight.

zukanDescs.desc: This form results from one Metagross, one Metang, and two Beldum linking up.

abilities.name: Tough Claws
abilities.desc: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

zukanDescs.desc: Every bit of Regirock's body is made of stone. As parts of its body erode, this Pokémon sticks rocks to itself to repair what's been lost.
Cutting-edge technology was used to study the internals of this Pokémon's rock body, but nothing was found—not even a brain or a heart.
Its entire body is made of rock. If any part chips off in battle, Regirock attaches rocks to repair itself.
Its entire body is made of rock. If any part chips off in battle, Regirock attaches rocks to repair itself.

This Pokémon's body is made of solid ice. It's said that Regice was born beneath thick ice in the ice age.
Its body is made of ice from the ice age. It controls frigid air of −328 degrees Fahrenheit.

zukanDescs.desc: Registeel's body is made of a strange material that is flexible enough to stretch and shrink but also more durable than any metal.
It's rumored that this Pokémon was born deep underground in the planet's mantle and that it emerged onto the surface 10,000 years ago.
Tempered by pressure underground over tens of thousands of years, its body cannot be scratched.
Tempered by pressure underground over tens of thousands of years, its body cannot be scratched.

abilities.name: Clear Body

Its body is covered with a down that can refract light in such a way that it becomes invisible.
It communicates its feelings using telepathy. To make itself invisible, it covers its body in down that refracts light.

abilities.name: Levitate
abilities.desc: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

zukanDescs.desc: Both its flying capabilities and its attack power have increased. It scatters transparent down to confuse its enemies.

abilities.name: Levitate
abilities.desc: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

zukanDescs.desc: It is a highly intelligent Pokémon. By folding back its forelegs in flight, it can overtake jet planes.

abilities.name: Drizzle

zukanDescs.desc: Kyogre reverted to this state via the Blue Orb, which contains the energy of the primordial world. Kyogre's body resembles seawater.

abilities.name: Primordial Sea
abilities.desc: The Pokémon changes the weather to nullify Fire-type attacks.

zukanDescs.desc: It had been asleep in underground magma ever since it fiercely fought Kyogre long ago.
It had been asleep in underground magma ever since it fiercely fought Kyogre long ago.
Groudon is said to have expanded the reach of dry land by evaporating water with raging heat. It battled ferociously against Kyogre.

abilities.name: Drought

zukanDescs.desc: This is Groudon's true form, restored using the Red Orb. Energy spills from its body in the form of magma.

abilities.desc: The Pokémon changes the weather to nullify Water-type attacks.

zukanDescs.desc: It lives in the ozone layer far above the clouds and cannot be seen from the ground.
It lives in the ozone layer far above the clouds and cannot be seen from the ground.
Rayquaza cannot be seen from the ground because it lives in the ozone layer, far above the clouds.

abilities.name: Air Lock
abilities.desc: Eliminates the effects of weather.

zukanDescs.desc: A shooting star streaking across the night sky may, in fact, be Mega Rayquaza flying gracefully after a meteoroid.

abilities.name: Delta Stream
abilities.desc: The Pokémon changes the weather so that no moves are super effective against the Flying type.

zukanDescs.desc: Once every 1,000 years, the singing of a pure voice will rouse this Pokémon from its near- perpetual slumber. It wakes for only seven days.
It's believed that when this Pokémon wakes from its 1,000-year slumber, it will grant any wishes written on the notes attached to its head.
It is said to wake up for just seven days every 1,000 years and use its power to grant any wish.
It is said to wake up for just seven days every 1,000 years and use its power to grant any wish.
